package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookup() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_recreated_for_static_lookup"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag static lookup maps rebuilt inside functions instead of package-level immutable tables."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
